'''Erron Kell''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who fought at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He later became a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].

When the Alliance re-formed into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Kell resigned his commission as he chafed under the regulations imposed by the now-legal government. Making use of old allies still working within the military, he managed to requisition a pair of out-of-commission [[B-wing/E starfighter]]s, which had been too damaged to be used by the military. Kell refurbished them, with assistance from [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], into his signature transport, ''[[Deathraven]]''. By the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Kell worked as a freelance pilot for anybody who could afford him.

{{Char-stub}}
